headline: BAE Systems completes preliminary design review for U.S. Space Force missile warning and tracking satellite system
summary: BAE Systems (LON: BA) has completed the Preliminary Design Review for the $1.2 billion U.S. Space Force (USSF) Space Systems Command (SSC) Resilient Missile Warning & Tracking (RMWT) – Medium Earth Orbit (MEO) Epoch 2 program to provide missile warning and tracking of advanced missile threats.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider BAE Systems (LSE:BA.) After A 45% One-Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether BAE Systems at around £22.49 is still offering fair value after a strong run, you are not alone. This article focuses squarely on what the current price might be implying. The share price moves have been significant, with returns of 1.3% over 7 days, 19.7% over 30 days, 28.2% year to date and 45.5% over 1 year. The 3 year return is very large and the 5 year return is around 4x the starting point. Recent interest in BAE Systems has been supported by ongoing...

headline: Boeing 737 MAX Quality Setback Tests Delivery Targets And Valuation Story
summary: Boeing reported a new production quality issue involving scratched wiring in undelivered 737 MAX aircraft. The problem is linked to a machining error and is leading to repairs and delivery delays for some jets. Boeing says its full year delivery target for the 737 MAX remains unchanged, although near term customer schedules are affected. The news lands at a sensitive moment for Boeing, NYSE:BA, as it works to rebuild confidence in its production processes and delivery reliability. The...

headline: Boeing Delays 737 Deliveries After Discovering ‘Scratched Wiring.’ What It Means for the Stock.
summary: Boeing  delivery numbers are looking relatively strong—but a 737 MAX wiring issue will create a new headwind for shares.  Investors are very attuned to any issue with Boeing’s single-aisle jet.  The company said on Tuesday that it had delivered 51 planes last month, including 43 737 MAX jets, its best February total since 2017.
